lighting.shadow_character: 그림자의 경계가 매우 부드럽고 농도가 옅으며, 깊지 않고 디테일이 살아있음

color.grading_style: 콘트라스트가 낮은 매트한 필름 룩 (Lifted Blacks, Compressed Highlights)

texture.detail_rendering: 린넨, 나무, 도자기, 음식 등 각 재료의 질감이 훌륭하게 표현됨

improvement_notes: 입체감을 위한 림 라이트 추가, 음식 부분의 국소적 채도/콘트라스트 강화, 김이나 손과 같은 동적 요소 추가를 통해 깊이감과 생동감을 더할 수 있음.
nano_banana_prompt: /imagine prompt: professional food photography of [FOOD NAME], minimalist Japanese style, shot from a 45-degree angle, medium shot. The scene is illuminated by a large, diffused soft light from the top-left, creating gentle and soft shadows. The overall color palette is warm and muted, dominated by beige, cream, and natural tones. The background is a plain light-beige wall, and the surface is a light-colored linen tablecloth. The image has a low-contrast, matte, and analog film aesthetic, with lifted blacks and fine grain, reminiscent of Kodak Portra 400 film stock. Shot on an 85mm lens at f/4, shallow depth of field with the main dish in tack-sharp focus. --ar 4:3 --style raw --v 6.0
